page.title: Road Freight
hero.heading: Road Freight Excellence: Connecting Morocco and Europe
hero.desc: Reliable daily road transport solutions across the Strait of Algeciras. MH Cargo specializes in the Morocco-Europe corridor, offering FTL and LTL services for both inbound supplies and outbound Moroccan products.
included.title: What is included in this service
included.desc: We provide consistent, professionally managed road freight solutions between Morocco and Europe. With guaranteed departure dates and real-time communication, your cargo is always on schedule.
feature1.title: FTL (Full Truck Load):
feature1.desc: Dedicated trucks for your exclusive use with direct routes from origin to destination. Ideal for large shipments requiring maximum speed and security.
feature2.title: LTL / Groupage (Less than Truck Load):
feature2.desc: Cost-effective shared truck space for smaller shipments. We consolidate cargo to optimize your transport costs without compromising on reliability.
feature3.title: Import & Export Road Services:
feature3.desc: Daily departures for Moroccan exports to European markets and reliable inbound logistics for raw materials and finished goods — with controlled flow management to keep your supply chain moving.
why.title: Why Choose Road Freight?
why.desc: MH Cargo is the Morocco-Europe road freight specialist. Our deep expertise in Strait of Algeciras logistics means your cargo crosses borders smoothly, every time.
why.bullet2: Deep expertise in Strait of Algeciras logistics
why.bullet3: Real-time communication with drivers and partners
why.bullet4: Reliable scheduling and guaranteed departure dates
why.bullet5: FTL and LTL for all cargo sizes
